titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 19A: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 19A. (A.R. No. 2 of 1898.) UTTIRAMĒRŪR, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Vaikunthaperumāḷ temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭakoparakesaripanmakkuRead kesarivanmarkkuyāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu nāḷ patiṉāṟu kāliyūrkoṭṭattu taṉkuṟṟuRead taṉkūṟṟu Uttarameruccaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ivvāṇṭu mutal Eṅkaḷukku perumāṉ Aṭikaḷ Emperumāṉ śrīviranārāyaṇan śrīpa(ā)ran=taka devan śrīparakesaripanmaruṭaiya śrīmukham varakkāṭṭa śrīmukhappaṭi Ā
jaiyiṉāl coḻanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu śrīvaṅkanakark kāñcai koṇṭayakramavitta bhaṭṭanākiya comāci perumān Iruntu vāriyamāka Āṭṭorukkālum samavatsaravāriyamu toṭṭavāriyamum Erivāriyamum Iṭuvataṟku vyavasthai ceta paricāvatu kuṭumpu muppatāy muppatu kuṭumpilum Avvav kuṭumpilā
re kūṭik kā nilattukkumel Iṟai nilamuṭaiyāṉ taṉmaṉaiyile Akammeṭuttuk koṇṭiruppāṉai Eḻupatu pirāyattiṉ kiḻ muppattaintu pirāyattiṉ meṟpaṭṭār mantrabrāhmaṇam vallan Otuviyattaṟiyavāṉaik kuṭavolai Iṭuvitākavum Araikkā nilame Uṭaiya nāyilu Oru vetam vallanāy nālu bhāṣyattilum Oru bhā
ṣyam vakkāṇittaṟiyavāṉ Avaṉaiyuṅ kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka Iṭuvatākavum Avarkaḷilum kāryyattil nipuṇarāy Ācāramuṭaiyarāṉāṉayey koḷuvitākavum Atdhaśośamum Ānmaśocamum Uṭaiyarāy muvāṭṭiṉippuṟam vāriyañ ceytilāttārai koḷvatākavum Epperppaṭṭa vāriyaṅkaḷum cetu kaṇakku kāṭṭāte Iruntāraiyum Ivarkaḷukkuc ciṟṟavaipper Avai ma
kkaḷaiyum Ivarkaḷukku Attai māmāṉ makkaḷaiyūmRead makkaḷaiyumIvarkaḷukkut tāyoṭu Uṭappiṟantāṉaiyum Ivarkaḷ tamappaṉoṭuṭap piṟantāṉaiyum taṉṉoṭuṭap piṟantāṉaiyum Ivarkaḷukkup piḷḷai kuṭutta māmaṉaiyum Ivarkaḷ brāhmaṇiyoṭap piṟantāṇaiyuRead piṟantāḷaiyumtaṉṉoṭuṭap piṟaṉtāḷai veṭṭāṉaiyu Uṭappiṟaṉtāṉ makkaḷaiyum taṉmakaḷai veṭṭa marumakaṉaiyum taṉ tamappaṉaiyum
taṉ makaṉaiyum Āka Iccuṭṭa bandhukkaḷaiyum kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka Iṭappeṟātatārākavum Agamyāgamaṉattilum mahāpātaṅkaḷil muṉpaṭain=ta nālu mahāpātakattilum meḻuttup paṭṭāraiyum Ivarkaḷukkum mun cuṭṭappaṭṭa Ittiṉai bandhukkaḷaiyum kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka Iṭappeṟātārākavum samasarggavatikarai prāyacittañ ceyyumaḷavum
kuṭavolai Iṭātatākavum tiyum sāhasiyarāyirupparaiyum kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka viṭappeṟātārākavum paradrāvyamRead paradravyam Apaharittāṉaiyum kuṭavolai Eḻutippukaviṭap peṟātārākavum Eppeṟpaṭṭa kaiyyūṭṭuṅ koṇṭāṉ krataprāyaścittañcaiytu śuddharāṉāṉaiyum Avvavar prāṇāntakam
vāriyattukkuk kuṭavolaiyeḻuti pukaviṭap peṟātatākavum pātakam(ñ) ceytu prāyaccittañThe medial � is engraved slightly below the line.ceytu śyaddhārāṉāṉaiyum grāmakaṇṭakarāy prāyaścittam ñcetu śuddharāṉāraiyu Agmyāgamaṉam cetu prāyaścitta(m) ñceytu śuddharāṉāraiyum Āka Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Aṉaiyvaraiyum prāṇāntikam vāriyattukkuk kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka viṭap peṟātatāka
vum Āka Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Ittaṉaiy peraiyum nikki Immuppatu kuṭumpilum kuṭavolaikkup per tiṭṭi Ippaṉṉiraṇṭu ceriyilumāka Ikkuṭumpum vevveṟey vāyolai pūṭṭi muppatu kuṭumpum vevveṟe kaṭṭik kuṭam puka Iṭuvatākavum kuṭavolai piṟikkum potu mahāsabhait tiruvaṭiyārai sabālavirundhamRead sabālavraddhamnirampak kūṭṭi koṇṭu Aṉṟuḷḷuril Irunta nampimār Oruvaraiyum Oḻiyā
me mahāsabhaiyile UḷmaṇṭaThe letter ma seems to be corrected from var • One is easily misled to read as var •kattiley Iruttik koṇṭu Anampimār naṭuvey Akkuṭattai nampimākilRead nampimārilviddharāyRead vraddharāy Iruppā(r)ṉoru nampimel nokki Ellā jjaṉamuṅRead jaṉamuṅ kāṇumāṟṟā(l)leṭuttuk koṇṭu niṟ(k)ka pakaleyntaramaṟiyātā(ṉ) ṉoru pālaṉaik koṇṭu Oru kuṭumpu vāṅki(ya) maṟṟoru kuṭattukkey pukaviṭṭu kulaittu Akkuṭatti(l)lorolai vāṅki madhyasthaṉ kaiyile
kuṭuppatākavum Akkuṭutta volai madhyasdhaṉ vāṅkum potu Añcu viralum Akala vaittu Uḷḷaṅ kaiyile Eṟṟuk koḷvaāṉākavum Āvveṟṟu vāṅkiṉa volai vāśippāṉākavum vāśitta Avvolai Aṅkuḷḷa pāṇṭakattiruntaRead maṇṭapattiruntanampimār Ellārum vācippārākavum vāśitta Apper tiṭṭuvatākavum Ippariśe muppatu kuṭumpilum Oroper koḷvatākavum Ikkoṇṭa muppatu perilum toṭṭa vāriyamum Erivāriyamum ceytāraiyum vijyavraddharaiyum
vayoviddharkaḷaiyum samvatsaravāriyaraiyum koḷvatākavum mikku niṉṟārup paṉṉiruvarait toṭṭavāriyaṅ koḷvitākavum niṉṟa Aṟuvaraiyum(m) Eri vāriyamākak koḷvatākavum Ivviraṇṭu tiṟattu vāriyamum karai kāṭṭi koḷvaThe letter va is found engraved below the line.tākavum Ivvāriyam ceykiṉṟa muṉṟu tiṟattu vāriyap perumakkaḷum muṉnūṟṟu Aṟupatu nāḷum nirampac ceytu Oḻivatākavum vāriyañ ceyyākiṉṟāraiRead ceyyā niṉṟārai Aparātaṅ
kaṇṭapotu Avaṉaiyoḻittuvatākavum Ivarkaḷ Oḻinta Aṉantara(m) miṭum vāriyaṅkaḷum paṉṉiraṇṭu ceriyilum dhanmakrattyaṅRead dhanyakratyaṅkaṭaikkāṇum vāriyare madhyastharaik koṇṭu kuṟi kūṭṭik kuṭuppārākavum Ivyasthai yolaippaṭiyey kkuk kuṭavolaiy paṟittuk koṇṭe vāriyam Iṭuvatākavum pañcavāra vāriyattukkum poṉvāriyattu
kku muppa(t)tuk kuṭumpi(yi)lum kuṭavolaikku per tiṭṭi muppatu vāyolai kaṭṭum puka Iṭṭu muppatu kuṭavolai paṟittu muppatilum paṉniraṇṭu per paṟittuk koḷvatākavum paṟitta paṉniraṇṭilum Aṟuvar poṉ vāriyam Aṟuvar pañcavāravāriyamum Āvanavākavum piṟṟai Āṇṭum Ivāriyaṅkaḷ kuṭavolai paṟikkum potu Ivvāriyaṅkaḷukku muṉṉam ce
yta kuṭumpaṉṟikke niṉṟa kuṭumpile karaipaṟittuk koḷuvatākavum kaḻutai Eṟiṉāraiyum kūṭalekai ceytāṉaiyum kuṭavolai Eḻutippuka Iṭappeṟātatākavu madhyastharum Artdhaśośam muṭaiyarai kaṇakkeḻutuvāṉākavum kaṇakkeḻutiṉāṉ kaṇakkup peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷoṭu kūṭak kaṇakkuk kāṭṭi śuddhan Āccitiṉpiṉnaṉṟi maṟṟuk kaṇa
kkup pukap peṟātāṉākavum tāṉ Eḻutiṉa kaṇakkut tāṉe kāṭṭuvāṉākavum maṟṟuk kaṇakkar pukku Oṭukkap peṟātār Ākavum Ipparicai Ivvāṇṭu mutal cantrādittavaṟ Eṉṟum kuṭavolai vāriyame Iṭuvatāka deventran cakravatti paṇḍitavatsalan kuñcaramallaṉ cūracūḷāmaṇi kalpakaśaritai śrīparakesaripanmar(ka) śrīmukhamaruḷuc cetu varakkāṭṭa śrīāñaiā
l coḻanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu śrīvaṅkanakark kāñcai koṇṭaya kramavitta bhaṭṭaṉṉākiya comāci perumāṉuṭaṉ Iruntu Ipparicu ceyvikka nam grāmattukku Abhyatayamāka duṣṭarkeṭṭu viśiṣṭar varddhippatāka vyavasthai ceytom Uttaramerucaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ipparicu kuṟiyuḷ Iruntu perumakkaḷ paṇikka lavyavasthai Eḻutiṉeṉ madhyasthan
kāṭṭip pottaṉ civakkuṟi Irājamalla maṅkalapriyaneṉ [.]
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 19A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
